name: NielsenIQ
overview_text: NielsenIQ is a leading global information and measurement company that provides insight and data on what consumers watch, listen to and buy. We collect, analyze and pass on this information to help our clients understand and respond to what is happening now, so they can better understand what will happen in the future.
headquarters_address: 645 Fifth Avenue, New York, NY 10017, USA

description: NielsenIQ is a leading global information and measurement company that provides insight and data on what consumers watch, listen to and buy. We collect, analyze and pass on this information to help our clients understand and respond to what is happening now, so they can better understand what will happen in the future.
vision_statement: To be the global leader in providing actionable insights and data-driven solutions that empower businesses to make informed decisions.
mission_statement: To deliver unparalleled market intelligence and analytics that drive growth, innovation, and customer satisfaction.

core_values.Integrity: We operate with transparency, honesty, and ethics in all our interactions.
core_values.Innovation: We foster a culture of creativity, experimentation, and continuous improvement.
core_values.Collaboration: We work together as a team to achieve common goals and deliver exceptional results.
core_values.Customer-centricity: We put our clients at the heart of everything we do, understanding their needs and exceeding their expectations.
core_values.Excellence: We strive for perfection in all aspects of our work, from data quality to customer service.

sales_motion: NielsenIQ's sales motion is focused on providing tailored solutions to clients, leveraging our expertise in market research and analytics to drive business growth and improvement.
exit_strategy_history: NielsenIQ has a history of successful acquisitions and divestitures, including the sale of its media business to E.W. Scripps Company in 2018.
carbon_footprint: NielsenIQ has set a goal to reduce its carbon footprint by 50% by 2025, with a focus on renewable energy, energy efficiency, and sustainable supply chain practices.
ethical_sourcing: NielsenIQ has implemented a robust supplier code of conduct and conducts regular audits to ensure compliance with ethical sourcing standards.

case_studies.title: Driving Sales Growth with NielsenIQ's Market Intelligence
case_studies.description: A leading CPG company partnered with NielsenIQ to gain insights into consumer behavior and preferences, resulting in a 10% increase in sales.

case_studies.title: Optimizing Supply Chain Operations with NielsenIQ's Analytics
case_studies.description: A major retailer worked with NielsenIQ to analyze supply chain data and optimize inventory management, leading to a 15% reduction in costs.

sustainability_csr.Environmental sustainability: NielsenIQ has set a goal to reduce its carbon footprint by 50% by 2025.
sustainability_csr.Social responsibility: NielsenIQ has implemented a robust supplier code of conduct and conducts regular audits to ensure compliance with ethical sourcing standards.
sustainability_csr.Governance and ethics: NielsenIQ operates with transparency, honesty, and ethics in all its interactions.

crisis_behavior: NielsenIQ has a crisis management plan in place, which includes regular scenario planning, communication protocols, and a dedicated crisis management team.
